heroSubtext: Every installation is backed by a 10-year warranty on glass and workmanship. No conditions, no fine print.

coveredItems.detail: Any seal failure, fogging, or manufacturing defect in the glass itself.
If it fails because of how we fitted it, we fix it free.
The fittings we use to attach new glass to your existing frame.
The seal and spacer bar that keep moisture and air out of the unit.

notCoveredItems.detail: Breakage caused by deliberate impact or misuse.
Damage caused by hail, fallen debris, or extreme weather events.
If the building settles and distorts the frame beyond the fitting's tolerance.

claimSteps: Call or email us with your job reference and a brief description.
We inspect within 7 business days — no charge for the visit.
If it's covered, we repair or replace at no cost to you.
ctaSubtext: Get your price in minutes. Every job comes with this warranty, in writing.
